headline: Waste Management (WM) Could Be 7% Undervalued On Its Sustainability Growth Story
summary: Waste Management (WM) shares edged up 1.45% to close at $236.71, catching investor attention ahead of the company’s July 28, 2026 earnings report, where forecasts point to EPS of $2. See our latest analysis for Waste Management. The recent 7.9% 30 day share price return and 8.4% year to date share price return suggest building momentum in Waste Management stock, while a 5 year total shareholder return of 78.2% highlights longer term compounding.
